command: Use @skill:chained-vulnerability-static-audit to perform a static-only chained vulnerability review of this codebase. Inspect only the current working directory. Do not use live probes, dynamic scanners, shell commands, or files outside this workspace. Write the final report with write_chained_vulnerability_report to docs/security/CHAINED_VULNERABILITIES_REVIEW.md.

## Dockerfile
FROM node:20-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . .
RUN npm run build
EXPOSE 8011
CMD ["npm", "start"]

chains.chain_name: SSRF to Cloud Metadata → Full Credential Response → IAM Key Exfiltration

unmatched_candidate_chain_titles: Chain 2: Stored XSS → Session/Token Theft via Widget Title
Chain 4: SSRF → Internal Service Reconnaissance → Header Leakage
Chain 5: Verbose Errors + SSRF → Information Disclosure
